mapper.sql: c.id, c.case_number, c.title, c.type_code, dct.name as type_name, c.status, c.reporter_name, c.reporter_contact, c.incident_time, c.incident_location, c.brief_description, c.handling_officer_id, u.name as handling_officer_name, c.department_id, dep.name as department_name, c.acceptance_time, c.deadline_time, c.is_overdue, c.created_at, c.updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into cases ( case_number, title, type_code, status, reporter_name, reporter_contact, incident_time, incident_location, brief_description, handling_officer_id, department_id, acceptance_time, deadline_time, is_overdue, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{caseNumber}, #{title}, #{typeCode}, #{status}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterContact}, #{incidentTime}, #{incidentLocation}, #{briefDescription}, #{handlingOfficerId}, #{departmentId}, #{acceptanceTime}, #{deadlineTime}, #{isOverdue}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.id = #{id}

select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.case_number = #{caseNumber}
mapper.update: update cases set title = #{title}, type_code = #{typeCode}, reporter_name = #{reporterName}, reporter_contact = #{reporterContact}, incident_time = #{incidentTime}, incident_location = #{incidentLocation}, brief_description = #{briefDescription}, department_id = #{departmentId}, deadline_time = #{deadlineTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update cases set handling_officer_id = #{handlingOfficerId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update cases set status = #{status}, acceptance_time = #{acceptanceTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select cp.*, u.name as operator_name from case_processes cp left join users u on u.id = cp.operator_id where cp.case_id = #{caseId} order by cp.id desc
select ce.*, u.name as upload_user_name from case_evidences ce left join users u on u.id = ce.upload_user_id where ce.case_id = #{caseId} order by ce.id desc
